mapper.select: SELECT p.product_no, p.product_no AS id, p.company_no, p.product_name, p.product_name AS name, p.product_details, p.product_details AS content, p.original_price, p.original_price AS price, p.is_active, p.img_url, p.img_url AS thumbnail, p.large_category, p.medium_category, p.deposit, p.reg_date, c.com_name, c.com_intro AS comIntro, c.com_address AS comAddress, c.img_url AS comImgUrl, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM product_like WHERE product_no = p.product_no) AS likeCnt, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM product_like WHERE product_no = p.product_no AND user_id = #{loginUserId}) AS isLiked, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM company_like WHERE company_no = p.company_no AND user_id = #{loginUserId}) AS isCompanyLiked, ( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT pt_all.tag SEPARATOR ',') FROM product_tag_map ptm_all INNER JOIN product_tag pt_all ON ptm_all.tag_id = pt_all.id WHERE ptm_all.product_no = p.product_no ) AS tag FROM product p LEFT JOIN company c ON p.company_no = c.company_no WHERE p.product_no = #{productNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product(company_no, product_name, product_details, original_price, is_active, img_url, large_category, medium_category, deposit, reg_date) VALUES(#{companyNo}, #{productName}, #{productDetails}, #{originalPrice}, #{isActive}, #{imgUrl}, #{largeCategory}, #{mediumCategory}, #{deposit}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT tag FROM product_tag ORDER BY id ASC

SELECT p.product_no, p.product_no AS id, p.company_no, p.product_name, p.product_name AS name, p.product_details, p.product_details AS content, p.original_price, p.original_price AS price, p.is_active, p.img_url, p.img_url AS thumbnail, p.large_category, p.medium_category, p.deposit, p.reg_date FROM product p WHERE p.large_category = #{largeCategory}

SELECT DISTINCT large_category, medium_category FROM product WHERE large_category IS NOT NULL AND medium_category IS NOT NULL ORDER BY FIELD(large_category, '결혼', '가족행사', '친구와함께'), medium_category ASC
SELECT tag, medium_category FROM product_tag WHERE tag IS NOT NULL AND medium_category IS NOT NULL

SELECT id FROM product_tag WHERE tag IN
#{tag}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM company_like WHERE user_id = #{loginUserId} AND company_no = #{companyNo}
DELETE FROM product_like WHERE user_id = #{loginUserId} AND product_no = #{productNo}
